name: Connected Boxes
description: Groups of 2-3 adjacent boxes linked by golden chains. Tap any one box in a group and ALL linked boxes fire their marbles at the same time!
howToPlay: Look for boxes connected by golden chain links — 5 linked groups form a chain reaction puzzle. Tap any box in a connected group to release marbles from ALL boxes in that group simultaneously. Plan your taps carefully to sort all colors!
author: Claude
